steps.t: Dwarves of the Landorrim, Narfanghoth, and Temámir can be found at Zirakazhâr on the slopes of Zirakzigil to the north-west of Amdân. Dáin has asked y…
King Agni the Wild, King Drógar Bloodwhisker, and King Jegín can be found at Zirakazhâr. You have arrived at Zirakazhâr. You should speak to the Kings…
Rung-shakam can be found to the north-west of Zirakazhâr. The Kings of the Landorrim, Narfanghoth, and Temámir have asked you to scout Rung-shakam and…
Trolls of Moria and Orkish drums can be found at Rung-shakam. Trophy-bones can be collected from Orcs and some goblins at Rung-shakam. You should aid …
You have done much to hinder Azog's forces at Rung-shakam. You should raise a banner of the Haban'akkâ of Thráin at Rung-shakam.
